posts.author: GeorgeKonstam (George Konstam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

There should be a filter called Team (Dynamic) which allows you to filter on Team items if you are part of those Team(s)

What are you trying to achieve

When Teams are assigned in People columns, have the ability to create a single dynamic view to filter work to users in different Teams
